compare-pdf-page-range__v2.title: Compare Selected Page Range of Two PDFs
compare-pdf-page-range__v2.description: Loads two PDF files, sets a page range in ComparisonOptions, and compares the selected pages, saving a visual diff PDF.

compare-pdfs-page-by-page__v2.title: Compare Two PDFs Page by Page and Save Diff PDF
compare-pdfs-page-by-page__v2.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents page by page using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer with default comparison options and save the resulting diff PDF.

compare-specific-pages.title: Compare Specific Pages of Two PDFs
compare-specific-pages.description: Demonstrates how to compare selected pages of two PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's Document.Compare method with a page list.

compare-pdfs-excluded-areas__v2.title: Compare PDFs with Excluded Areas
compare-pdfs-excluded-areas__v2.description: Shows how to exclude specific rectangular regions from two PDF documents during comparison using ComparisonOptions.

exclude-annotations-from-pdf-comparison.title: Exclude Annotations from PDF Comparison
exclude-annotations-from-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to exclude annotation regions from side‑by‑side PDF comparison by adding their bounding rectangles to the ExcludeAreas collections.

compare-pdfs-excluding-footers.title: Compare PDFs Excluding Footer Areas
compare-pdfs-excluding-footers.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents while ignoring footer regions by setting ExcludeAreas in SideBySideComparisonOptions.

compare-pdfs-ignore-case.title: Compare PDFs Ignoring Case Differences
compare-pdfs-ignore-case.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents while ignoring case differences by setting ComparisonOptions.IgnoreCase before the comparison.

compare-pdfs-image-tolerance.title: Compare PDFs with Custom Image Similarity Tolerance
compare-pdfs-image-tolerance.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files containing scanned images using a custom tolerance for image differences.

compare-pdfs-with-form-fields.title: Compare PDFs with Form Fields Using Aspose.Pdf
compare-pdfs-with-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents that contain form fields and include the field values in the diff by enabling the appropriate ComparisonOptions flag.

compare-pdfs-excluding-signatures.title: Compare PDFs Excluding Signature Fields
compare-pdfs-excluding-signatures.description: Compares two PDF documents while treating digital signature fields as unchanged regions by excluding them from the comparison.

compare-pdfs-side-by-side.title: Compare PDFs with Different Page Sizes Using Side‑by‑Side Comparison
compare-pdfs-side-by-side.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files that have different page dimensions by using the SideBySidePdfComparer, which aligns the pages side‑by‑side in the result document.

compare-pdfs-ignore-compression.title: Compare PDFs Textually Ignoring Compression Differences
compare-pdfs-ignore-compression.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs that differ only in compression settings using TextPdfComparer, ensuring compression does not affect textual diff results.

compare-pdfs-unicode.title: Compare PDFs with Different Language Encodings
compare-pdfs-unicode.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files that use different language encodings and detect Unicode text differences using Aspose.Pdf.

compare-pdf-font-differences.title: Compare PDFs and Detect Font Differences
compare-pdf-font-differences.description: Loads two PDF files, compares them using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer, and reports font differences as separate diff operations while saving a visual diff PDF.

compare-encrypted-pdfs.title: Compare Encrypted PDFs Using Passwords
compare-encrypted-pdfs.description: Demonstrates opening two password‑protected PDF files by supplying passwords to the Document constructors and comparing them side‑by‑side.

visual-diff-pdf.title: Generate Visual Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
visual-diff-pdf.description: Compares two PDF files graphically and creates a PDF that highlights the differences.

get-image-differences.title: Get Image Differences Between Two PDF Pages
get-image-differences.description: Loads two PDF files, compares their first pages graphically, and outputs basic information about the image differences.

generate-diff-pdf.title: Generate Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
generate-diff-pdf.description: Creates a diff PDF that highlights changes between two PDFs using GraphicalPdfComparer.CompareDocumentsToPdf.

generate-diff-pdf__v2.title: Generate Diff PDF with Highlighted Text Changes
generate-diff-pdf__v2.description: Compares two PDFs, creates a diff PDF with highlighted text changes using default styles, and verifies that the highlight colors match the documented defaults.

json-diff-report.title: Generate JSON Diff Report from PDF Comparison
json-diff-report.description: Compares two PDF files, obtains the list of DiffOperation objects, and writes a JSON report using JsonDiffOutputGenerator.

replace-changed-text-pdf.title: Replace Changed Text in PDF Using DiffOperation
replace-changed-text-pdf.description: Compares two PDFs, extracts the original text using DiffOperation objects, and replaces the text in the second PDF with the original content.

compare-pdfs-log-differences.title: Compare Two PDFs and Log Differences
compare-pdfs-log-differences.description: Compares two PDF documents page by page and writes each difference operation type with its page number to a text file for audit.

universal-pdf-comparison.title: Universal PDF Comparison with Embedded Multimedia Support
universal-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's generic TextPdfComparer to compare two PDFs (including those with embedded multimedia) and save a visual diff PDF.

copy-metadata-to-diff-pdf.title: Copy Original PDF Metadata to Comparison Result PDF
copy-metadata-to-diff-pdf.description: Compares two PDFs side‑by‑side, generates a diff PDF, and copies the original document's metadata to the resulting diff file.

multi-threaded-pdf-comparison.title: Multi-Threaded PDF Comparison Using Aspose.Pdf
multi-threaded-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to compare multiple PDF pairs concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's SideBySidePdfComparer and collect the resulting comparison PDFs.

parallel-pdf-comparison.title: Parallel PDF Comparison with Concurrency Limit
parallel-pdf-comparison.description: Compares a batch of PDF files against a reference PDF using Aspose.Pdf's comparison API with parallel processing while limiting concurrency to control memory usage.

pdf-comparison-zip.title: Generate PDF Comparison Images and Package into ZIP
pdf-comparison-zip.description: Compares two PDFs graphically, saves the difference images, and packages them into a ZIP archive for easy distribution.
